descriptions: Intelligence suggests a {faction} facility on {system} holds valuable data. A clean extraction is worth serious credits.
A contact needs someone to slip into the {faction} compound at {system}. Reach the terminal, grab the data, get out.
Security logs at {system} indicate a vulnerability in the {faction} network. Get in, download what you can, and leave no trace.
The {faction} facility at {system} has been running dark for weeks. Someone needs to find out why.
objectives: Reach the target terminal and download data
Access the restricted area undetected
Infiltrate the secure wing and retrieve intel
Reach the control room and extract records

descriptions: A valuable package was lost inside a {faction} warehouse at {system}. Retrieve it before they catalog it.
Our client needs a prototype recovered from the {faction} facility at {system}. High value, higher risk.
A shipment went missing at {system}. The {faction} claim ignorance, but we know it's inside their compound.
There's something valuable hidden deep in the {faction} storage complex at {system}. Find it and bring it back.
objectives: Locate and retrieve the target item
Find the lost cargo container
Recover the prototype from the secured vault
Extract the package from deep storage

descriptions: A rival operation needs the {faction} communications array at {system} taken offline. Clean work pays double.
The {faction} security grid at {system} is overdue for an upgrade. Help them with an unscheduled shutdown.
Someone wants the power relays at the {faction} facility on {system} disabled. Temporarily, of course.
The {faction} surveillance network at {system} needs to go dark for a few hours. Make it happen.
objectives: Disable the primary communications array
Shut down the security grid control nodes
Sabotage the power distribution relays
Disable surveillance systems at multiple locations

descriptions: We need a full survey of the {faction} sector at {system}. Map everything and report back.
Nobody's been deep inside the {faction} complex at {system} in years. Time to change that.
A client wants detailed maps of the {faction} lower levels at {system}. Standard recon, good pay.
The {faction} compound at {system} has expanded recently. We need eyes on the new sections.
objectives: Map the facility and reach the extraction point
Survey all accessible areas of the compound
Explore the lower levels and document findings
Complete a full reconnaissance of the facility

descriptions: One of our contacts is stuck inside the {faction} facility at {system}. Get them out safely.
A defector from the {faction} at {system} wants out. Reach them and guide them to extraction.
An operative went dark inside the {faction} compound at {system}. Find them and bring them home.
A worker at the {faction} facility on {system} has critical information. Escort them to safety.
objectives: Locate the contact and escort them to the exit
Find the defector and guide them to extraction
Reach the operative and secure an exit route
Escort the informant safely out of the facility
